bookSourceComment: 零点诗人的明日方舟源
header: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.6778.140 Safari/537.36

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
(function(){
    let parsed = JSON.parse(result);
    let data = parsed.data;
    
    // 统一转换为数组
    let list;
    if (Array.isArray(data)) {
        // 最近更新：已经是数组
        list = data;
    } else {
        // 推荐阅读：单个对象，包装成数组
        list = [data];
list[0].coverUrl=data.pcBg;
    }
    return JSON.stringify(list);
})()
</js>
$.[*]
ruleExplore.name: $.title

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
function extractEpisodesInfo(data) {
    const cid = data.cid; // 获取主cid
    const episodes = data.episodes; // 获取episodes数组
    const resultArray = [];

    episodes.forEach((episode) => {
        // 转换时间格式为yyyy/MM/dd
        const date = new Date(episode.displayTime * 1000);
        const displayTime = `${date.getFullYear()}/${String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')}/${String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')}`;
        
        // 构造URL
        const url = `https://terra-historicus.hypergryph.com/api/comic/${cid}/episode/${episode.cid}`;

        const episodeInfo = {
            cid: cid, // 主cid
            title: !isNaN(parseInt(episode.shortTitle)) ? `${episode.shortTitle} ${episode.title}` : episode.shortTitle, // 判断shortTitle是否可以转换为整数
            eid: episode.cid, // episodes的cid
            displayTime: displayTime, // 标准化时间
            url: url // 新增url属性
        };
        resultArray.push(episodeInfo);
    });

    return resultArray.reverse();
}
result=extractEpisodesInfo(JSON.parse(result).data);

</js>$.[*]
